name: next-boilerplate
description: Production-grade multi-tenant SaaS starter on Next.js 16 with strict three-layer architecture.

layers.app: Next.js App Router — pages, layouts, route handlers. Thin glue importing both layers below.
layers.modules_next: Next.js binding layer — React components, hooks, *.service.next.ts extensions. Imports modules/* + Next/React.
layers.modules: Framework-agnostic business logic — services, DTOs, entities. No next/*, no react, no browser APIs.

conventions.architecture: Three layers, strict one-way dependency: app/ -> modules_next/ -> modules/. modules/ NEVER imports modules_next/ or app/.
conventions.scopes: Two URL scopes: system (super-admin, no tenant) under /system/... and tenant (per-tenant, resolved by proxy.ts) under /tenant/[tenantId]/.... Each has its own /admin, /api, /auth subtrees.
conventions.auth: JWT (httpOnly cookies), OTP, TOTP, SAML, OAuth (12+ providers via auth_sso), WebAuthn/Passkeys (user_security). Sessions: user_session (4 sub-services). Impersonation: always audited.
conventions.testing: Vitest + @testing-library/react. Tests colocated as *.test.ts / *.test.tsx beside the file under test. Run `npm test`.
conventions.security: Read SECURITY.md for the full threat model. Path alias is the single `@/*` -> `./*`. Multi-tenant data isolation enforced by per-tenant TypeORM DataSource (modules/db).

modules.name: Common Primitives
modules.description: AppError + ErrorCode enum + error-response helper. Dependency-free leaf module loaded by every other module.

modules.name: Environment
modules.description: Zod-validated env var access. Single source of truth — never read process.env directly outside this module.

modules.name: Logger
modules.description: Winston-based structured logger. Use instead of console.* across the codebase.

modules.name: Redis
modules.description: Shared ioredis client + BullMQ connection helpers + Pub/Sub-safe createRedisConnection().

modules.name: Database
modules.description: TypeORM DataSource factory — single shared DB for all entities, optional per-tenant DB override via TenantDatabase.

modules.name: Rate Limiter
modules.description: Sliding-window rate limiter + tenant-plan-based quota enforcement (seat/feature/usage limits).

modules.name: Observability
modules.description: Sentry + Prometheus + OTel facade. Auto-tags every log/trace/metric with the active tenantId/userId/requestId via Logger AsyncLocalStorage context. Lazy-loaded — no-op when SENTRY_DSN / METRICS_ENABLED / OTEL_ENABLED are unset.

modules.name: Idempotency Keys
modules.description: Redis-backed idempotency-key store for safely retryable POST/PATCH operations.

modules.name: Setting
modules.description: System-wide key-value settings store. Modules declare their keys in *.setting.keys.ts; the setting service stores/reads them.

modules.name: User Agent Parser
modules.description: Parse User-Agent header into device/OS/browser metadata. Used to annotate sessions and audit logs.

modules.name: File Storage
modules.description: Pluggable S3-compatible file storage (AWS S3, Cloudflare R2, DigitalOcean Spaces, MinIO).

modules.name: User
modules.description: Core user CRUD: create, find, update, deactivate. Foundation for every auth and tenancy flow.

modules.name: User Preferences
modules.description: Per-user preferences: theme, language, timezone, notification opt-ins.

modules.name: User Profile
modules.description: Profile fields (avatar, bio, locale, timezone) — separated from the user entity for read scalability.

modules.name: User Security
modules.description: Password hashing, account lock, TOTP secret, WebAuthn/Passkey credentials.

modules.name: User Session
modules.description: JWT access/refresh issuance + revocation, Redis-backed session cache, CRUD on UserSession rows.

modules.name: Linked Social Accounts
modules.description: Per-user linked OAuth provider accounts (provider id, external user id, tokens).

modules.name: Authentication
modules.description: Credential auth: login, register, password reset, email verify, OTP, TOTP. Coordinates user, user_session, user_security, notification_mail.

modules.name: SAML SSO
modules.description: SAML 2.0 SSO with per-tenant IdP configuration (SamlConfig entity).

modules.name: OAuth SSO
modules.description: OAuth 2.0 SSO with 12 providers: Google, GitHub, Apple, Microsoft, Facebook, LinkedIn, Twitter, Slack, TikTok, WeChat, Autodesk.

modules.name: Admin Impersonation
modules.description: Allow a system admin to assume a target user's session (always audited).

modules.name: SCIM 2.0
modules.description: System for Cross-domain Identity Management (RFC 7643/7644). Lets enterprise IdPs (Okta, Azure AD, OneLogin, Google Workspace) auto-provision and deprovision tenant members.

modules.name: Tenant
modules.description: Tenant CRUD, lifecycle (active/suspended/deleted), soft-deletion service. Foundation of multi-tenancy.

modules.name: Tenant Member
modules.description: Tenant-scoped membership join table with roles (owner/admin/member) and per-member permissions.

modules.name: Tenant Invitation
modules.description: Email invitation flow: create / accept / decline / revoke. Bound to tenant_member on acceptance.

modules.name: Tenant Session
modules.description: Tenant-scoped session handling: bind a user session to a specific tenant, resolve tenant from request.

modules.name: Tenant Branding
modules.description: White-label branding: logo, favicon, colors, font, custom CSS — read by the proxy/shell to render per-tenant chrome.

modules.name: Tenant Domain
modules.description: Custom domain mapping per tenant + DNS verification (TXT/CNAME challenge).

modules.name: Tenant Subscription
modules.description: Tenant subscription state, plan + feature key resolution, grace period, expiry job.

modules.name: Tenant Usage
modules.description: Usage metric tracking per tenant (API calls, storage GB, seats). Source for plan-limit enforcement.

modules.name: Payment
modules.description: Pluggable payment processing (Stripe, PayPal, Iyzico) + subscription plans, plan features, payment transactions, webhook handling.

modules.name: Tenant Export
modules.description: Export all per-tenant data into a downloadable archive (GDPR-friendly).

modules.name: Coupon
modules.description: Discount coupons + redemption tracking. Provider-aware (Stripe / PayPal / Iyzico) so codes sync with the payment processor.

modules.name: Payment Sell
modules.description: One-time product / service payment processing. Uses payment_core providers (Stripe, PayPal, Iyzico, Alipay, WeChat Pay, YooKassa, CloudPayments). Tenant-aware checkout sessions, transactions, and refunds.

modules.name: Payment Subscription
modules.description: Recurring subscription lifecycle: plans, plan features, subscriber management, proration, billing cycle tracking. Provider-agnostic (Stripe, PayPal, Iyzico, …). Tenant-aware — every plan and subscription is scoped to a tenant.

modules.name: Payment Cart
modules.description: Tenant-aware shopping cart for users and anonymous guests. Manages cart items, quantities, coupon codes, totals, guest-to-user merge, and conversion to checkout.

modules.name: Payment Shipping
modules.description: Tenant-aware shipping methods and a rate-calculation engine. Define carriers and rate rules (by country, region, weight, subtotal) and compute shipping quotes at checkout.

modules.name: Invoice
modules.description: Tenant-scoped invoicing with regional e-invoicing adapters (TR e-Arşiv, EU Peppol, US Stripe Tax). Each tenant issues its own invoices keyed to its own subscription / payment flow.

modules.name: In-App Notifications
modules.description: In-app notification feed with unread counts. Consumed by the notification menu in the app shell.

modules.name: Email Notifications
modules.description: Pluggable email sender (SMTP, SES, Mailgun, Postmark, Resend, SendGrid). EJS templates. BullMQ-backed queue.

modules.name: Web Push Notifications
modules.description: Web Push (VAPID) — subscription storage + send.

modules.name: SMS Notifications
modules.description: Pluggable SMS sender (Twilio, Nexmo, Clickatell, NetGSM).

modules.name: Notification Log
modules.description: Unified outbound notification audit log across mail, sms, push, inapp channels.

modules.name: Payment Tax
modules.description: Tenant-aware tax/VAT calculation engine: tax classes, destination-matched rates, compound and price-inclusive computation.

modules.name: Payment Wishlist
modules.description: Tenant-aware wishlists / favorites. Users keep multiple named lists of products and variants, with optional public sharing via a share token.

modules.name: Payment Return / RMA
modules.description: Customer return, exchange and refund (RMA) requests with line items and an append-only status-event log. Tenant-aware, references orders from a future order module.

modules.name: Payment Loyalty Points
modules.description: Tenant-aware loyalty points program. Earn / redeem points, lifetime-driven tiers with earn multipliers, manual adjustments, transaction ledger, and point expiry.

modules.name: E-Signature & E-Identity
modules.description: Multi-country e-identity login + e-signature (eIDAS/OIDC4IDA). Pluggable providers (TR Mobil İmza, Smart-ID, BankID, itsme, FranceConnect, eIDAS-nPA, Signicat).

modules.name: SEO Metadata
modules.description: Polymorphic SEO metadata (title, description, Open Graph, canonical, noIndex) attachable to any entity type via entityType + entityId pair.

modules.name: Media Gallery
modules.description: Polymorphic ordered image gallery attachable to any entity type. Items wrap UploadedFile rows (storage module) and add gallery-side overlay: sortOrder, isPrimary, altText, title.

modules.name: API Key
modules.description: Tenant-scoped API keys for programmatic access (hashed at rest, scope-bound).

modules.name: Audit Log
modules.description: Append-only audit trail for sensitive actions, stored per-tenant (platform events land on ROOT_TENANT_ID).

modules.name: Store
modules.description: Tenant-aware e-commerce store. Hierarchical categories with typed spec templates; products with Tiptap richtext descriptions, spec values, multiple images, tags, SEO; variation types (Color, Size, …) with options and swatches; product variants with independent SKU / price / stock per combination; product bundles with per-item quantity and price overrides. Admin-only — no storefront UI layer.

modules.name: Outgoing Webhooks
modules.description: Subscriber-configured outbound webhooks (tenant-scoped; root tenant carries platform-wide events), signed deliveries, retry+redelivery.

modules.name: Order Fulfillment
modules.description: Tenant-aware fulfillment and shipment tracking for orders. Manages packing, carrier tracking, status lifecycle, and an append-only event log.

modules.name: Product Review
modules.description: Tenant-aware product ratings and reviews with verified-purchase flags, helpful voting, moderation lifecycle, and cached per-product rating summaries.

modules.name: AI
modules.description: Pluggable AI providers (Anthropic, OpenAI, Google). Chat, embeddings, streaming, usage tracking.

modules.name: Dynamic Pages
modules.description: Tenant-aware block-based page builder with i18n support. Supports code blocks (Prose, Hero, Popup Modal, Custom) and custom HTML template blocks. Public pages served at /tenant/[tenantId]/p/[slug].

modules.name: API Documentation
modules.description: OpenAPI/Swagger spec builder + helpers for serving per-tenant API docs.
